title: Finally sleeping through the night
text: I have struggled with sleep for years and tried everything. Started taking this magnesium glycinate about 3 weeks ago and I am genuinely surprised by how much better I sleep. I take 2 tablets about an hour before bed. No grogginess in the morning. The tablets are a normal size, easy to swallow.

title: Stopped my leg cramps
text: I was getting terrible leg cramps at night, especially after working out. My doctor suggested magnesium. I tried a couple of other forms but they upset my stomach. This glycinate form has no GI issues for me and the cramps are essentially gone after two weeks. Really happy with this.

title: Good but tablets are huge
text: The product itself seems to work well for muscle recovery after my marathon training. My only complaint is that the tablets are quite large. I have to take them with a full glass of water or I feel them sitting in my throat. Still giving 4 stars because the quality seems good and the price per dose is reasonable.

title: Didn't notice much difference
text: I took this for 6 weeks hoping to see improvement in sleep and anxiety. Honestly I didn't notice much of a difference. Maybe I need a higher dose. I am still giving 3 stars because the quality seems legitimate and other people clearly have good results — it just didn't work for me personally.

title: Recommended by my cardiologist
text: My cardiologist specifically recommended the glycinate form for bioavailability and this brand by name. Have been taking it for 4 months. Blood work shows my magnesium levels are now in the optimal range after being chronically low for years. Worth every penny.

title: Helps with anxiety and stress
text: I am a nurse and I know the research on magnesium and the stress response. I have been recommending this brand to patients for years. The chelated form is genuinely more absorbable than cheap oxide forms. I take it myself — 2 tablets in the morning and 2 at night — and it takes the edge off a stressful shift noticeably.

title: Subtle smell but effective
text: The tablets have a slight smell when you open the bottle that surprised me. Not unpleasant, just noticeable. The effectiveness is good — I have been using this to help with constipation and it works gently without cramping. Would be 5 stars if not for the smell.

title: Best magnesium I have tried
text: Tried magnesium oxide, malate, and citrate before landing on this glycinate form. Glycinate is hands down the best for sleep without any digestive side effects. This brand specifically has been consistent across multiple orders — no change in quality. The TRAACS chelation is the real deal.

title: Works for restless legs
text: I have restless leg syndrome and was skeptical anything over the counter would help. After 10 days on this I noticed the restless leg sensations reduced significantly at night. I still take my prescription but this has meaningfully reduced the severity. Very glad I tried it.
